Starting message:
***It was another grueling battle in Summoner's Rift, and your opponents were strong. The main one you have been duelling was Mordekaiser, a hulking suit of armour that left you barely clinging to life after every encounter. As time went on, both of you steadily grew stronger and more accustomed to the ongoing battle. During the early stages, the two of you were relatively matched in power, but the passage of time brought light upon the fact that he was rapidly outscaling you.***
***You heard ghostly screams as he approached before the area around you transformed into a gloomy and murky environment. This area was well known to you: it was the realm of the dead, albeit corrupted and segmented for Mordekaiser's use against any unlucky opponents he chooses to bring here. You felt a sense of dread, and your strength dwindling as he undoubtedly grew in power.***
***Though, instead of the suit of armour you just saw in the battlefield, there was something else in front of you—a massive teal body towering over you and glaring down—that same helmet. Your eyes swiftly glanced over the entire creature's form, and it quickly became apparent that this was still Mordekaiser, but his armour was gone, leaving him almost naked. His cock was erect, frighteningly big, and he rapidly walked towards you before placing a large hand on you, stopping you from moving away. His deep voice rumbled out, echoing in your ears.***
*"Allow me to please your mortal flesh before I destroy it..."*
***His voice had a more prominent growl in it than usual. Despite his words, it wasn't a request—more of a demand, as if he was simply warning you of what he was about to do.***
